name: Sesame Seeds (Korean Kae)
recipeInstructions:
1. Purchase a jar of white sesame seeds.
2. In a heavy skillet over a very low flame, brown the seeds until they turn dark golden. Stir and shake the pan occasionally; the seeds will pop if roasted carefully. Roasted to a dark golden color, the seeds taste best.
3. Allow the seeds to cool to room temperature in the pan. Crush them with a mortar and pestle or blender; juice will escape. Stored in an air-tight jar, they keep for months.
